---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new meta-learner, dataset, metric, or analysis.
labels: enhancement
---

## What

A short description of the feature.

## Why

The use case. If you can point at a paper or a real-world setting, even
better.

## Sketch

If you have a sketch of the API or implementation, drop it here. Doesn't
have to be polished.

## Out of scope?

Anything related you're explicitly not asking for.
